settings.label: Who Is It For
settings.body:
Anyone who wants the gut-health benefits of a real, live-cultured fermented drink — without buying expensive store-bought probiotics or worrying about a homemade ferment going wrong.

  • People with everyday digestion issues — bloating, irregularity, post-meal heaviness
  • Anyone curious about traditional Indian ferments but intimidated by the process
  • Capsule-skeptics who want their probiotics from real food, not pills
  • First-time fermenters who want a foolproof setup

settings.label: How To Make
settings.body:
1. Chop & Add — Black carrots, beetroot. Fill 20% of the jar.
  2. Spice + Boost + Water — Pour both sachets. Top up with filtered water.
  3. Seal With Airlock — Wait 3–5 days. Watch the bubbles.
  4. Strain & Enjoy — Refrigerate. Daily 50ml serving.

settings.label: What's Inside
settings.body:
• 2L Borosilicate Glass Jar — reusable, dishwasher-safe
  • Airlock Lid — one-way valve, no daily burping
  • Kanji Spice Mix — calibrated 45g sachet
  • Ferment Boost — prebiotic blend that cuts ferment time
  • Storage Lid — swap once ready, fridge for up to 2 weeks
  • Recipe Book — 7 seasonal recipes + step-by-step guide

settings.heading: Digestion Improves (First 7 Days)
settings.description: Live Lactobacillus reach your gut. Digestion feels smoother, post-meal heaviness eases, and mornings get more predictable.

settings.heading: Less Bloating (Week 2–3)
settings.description: Daily kanji reduces fermentation gas in the gut. Meals digest cleaner, the post-lunch slump fades, your stomach feels flatter.

settings.heading: Steadier Energy (Day 30+)
settings.description: Better gut balance = better nutrient absorption. Iron, B12, and magnesium reach you more efficiently — energy holds through the afternoon.

settings.heading: No daily burping
settings.description: One-way valve lets CO₂ escape, blocks oxygen + dust. Mould risk: zero.

settings.heading: Kanji Spice Mix
settings.bullets:
Ground mustard powder (the wild starter)
Sea salt (controls fermentation)
Chilli powder (warmth + colour)
Ginger powder (digestive support)

settings.heading: Ferment Boost
settings.bullets:
Inulin (chicory root prebiotic fibre)
FOS (fructo-oligosaccharides)
Resistant dextrin (slow-fermenting fuel)
Cuts ferment time to 3–5 days

settings.description: Swap once ready · refrigerate up to 2 weeks.

settings.question: How long does it take to ferment?
settings.answer: 3–5 days at typical Indian room temperature (25–32°C). Cooler weather may extend it to 6–7 days. The bubbles in the airlock tell you when it's active.

settings.question: Is this really probiotic?
settings.answer: Yes. Wild lacto-fermentation produces 8+ strains of beneficial Lactobacillus bacteria, with measurable CFU counts by day 5.

settings.question: How long does it last?
settings.answer: Once ready, swap to the storage lid and refrigerate. Refrigerated kanji stays good for up to 2 weeks.

settings.question: Can I reuse the jar?
settings.answer: The jar lasts years — borosilicate glass, dishwasher-safe. The airlock is reusable indefinitely. Just buy refills.
